description: Fix mouse wheel scroll in ShopPanel (Buy/Sell): follow-selection was resetting _scrollOffset each frame
summary: Quick task initialized (dir created) but planner/executor agents NOT spawned yet — paused due to context pressure at 78%. Bug diagnosed, fix is ~5 lines in ShopPanel.cs.

completed_tasks.name: gsd-tools init quick — task dir created
Root cause identified in ShopPanel.UpdateLayoutCache lines 218-220

Update STATE.md Quick Tasks Completed table

human_actions_pending.action: After resume: playtest scroll wheel on Sell tab (9+ items in inventory). Confirm thumb moves with wheel.
human_actions_pending.context: User reported wheel did nothing while arrows worked — confirmed bug via code read, not yet verified post-fix.

decisions.decision: Scope this quick task to ScrollWheelDelta consumption only — NOT bundled with Buy qty widget, full mouse navigation (Test 10), or save persistence BLOCKER (Test 13)
decisions.rationale: Keep quick task atomic. Other gaps tracked in 04-UAT.md for a separate gap-closure plan.

decisions.decision: Fix approach: when wheel != 0, also pull _selectedIndex into the new viewport window so follow-selection logic in UpdateLayoutCache does not override the scroll
decisions.rationale: Minimal 3-line addition, preserves arrow-key navigation semantics, avoids redesigning follow-selection behavior.

bug_details.root_cause: Wheel handler sets _scrollOffset, but UpdateLayoutCache runs same frame and executes: if (_selectedIndex < _scrollOffset) _scrollOffset = _selectedIndex. Since _selectedIndex is 0 initially, scroll is reset to 0 every frame. Arrow keys work because they change _selectedIndex first, so follow-selection carries scroll along.
bug_details.proposed_fix: In Update wheel block, after clamping _scrollOffset, add: if (_selectedIndex < _scrollOffset) _selectedIndex = _scrollOffset; else if (_selectedIndex >= _scrollOffset + VisibleRows) _selectedIndex = _scrollOffset + VisibleRows - 1;
bug_details.verification_required: Sell tab with 9+ filled inventory slots: wheel up/down moves thumb + visible rows. Selection stays within viewport. Arrow keys still work as before.
bug_details.buy_tab_note: Buy will only visibly scroll if ShopStock.Items > 8 (currently exactly 8). Not part of this fix — separate scope.

next_action: On resume: read .planning/quick/260413-ueq-fix-mouse-wheel-scroll-in-shoppanel-buy-/.continue-here.md for full context, then either (a) spawn gsd-planner + gsd-executor per /gsd-quick, or (b) apply the 5-line fix directly via Edit + dotnet build + git commit (recommended — task too small for subagent overhead).
